rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component type or implementation annexes based on scope requirements.
Use component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; use implementation annexes for assignments.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annex blocks without altering component structure.
Ensure AGREE annex content respects visibility of component features and properties.
Relate outputs to inputs in guarantees for deterministic dependency contracts.
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not insert AGREE annex content that conflicts with existing AADL structure.
